name: Pain of Stifled Rage
descs:
When inflicting [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn' with a Skill effect to an enemy that has [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn', gain 1 [Agility] next turn. (once per Skill, 2 times per turn)

If the affected unit already has [Agility], gain 1 [Agility] and 2 [AttackUp] instead.

When inflicting [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn' with a Skill effect to an enemy that has [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn', gain 1 [Agility] next turn. (once per Skill, 3 times per turn)

If the affected unit already has [Agility], gain <style="upgradeHighlight">2 [Agility]</style> and 2 [AttackUp] instead.

When inflicting [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn' with a Skill effect to an enemy that has [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn', gain 1 [Agility] next turn. (once per Skill, 3 times per turn)

If the affected unit already has [Agility], gain 2 [Agility], 2 [AttackUp], and <style="upgradeHighlight">2 [AttackDmgUp]</style> instead.
